description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of L'Oréal Paris Excellence Cool Creme, a hair dye product, featuring a prominent image of a woman with light brown hair on the front. The box is primarily white and purple, with gold and blue accents, and contains detailed product information and branding. The front displays the product name, shade number (7.11), and key features such as 'long-lasting color' and 'anti-brass purple technology.' The sides of the box show images of the included components: a tube of cream, a bottle, and a sachet, along with further instructions and marketing text. The top of the box is sealed and shows a swatch of the hair color. The back and one side are not visible, but the overall structure is a standard retail packaging for hair dye.
description: A rectangular L'Oréal Paris Excellence Cool Creme hair dye box with a woman's image, product branding, and purple-themed graphics. The packaging highlights anti-brass technology and includes images of the dye kit components.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main branding, a woman's face, product name, shade number, and key features in gold, purple, and blue.
description_view_1: This side view displays images of the dye kit components and detailed product information in Turkish, with a focus on the anti-brass purple technology.
description_view_2: The back view is plain and unmarked, showing only a solid color with no visible graphics or text.
description_view_3: The opposite side view is similar to view 1, showing the dye kit components and product information, but from a mirrored angle.
attribute_brand_logo: L'Oréal Paris logo in gold lettering on the front.
attribute_label_text: L'OREAL PARIS 7.11 YENI EXCELLENCE cool creme ZENGINLESTIRILMIS 3'LU BAKIM ICEREN KREM BOYA UZUN SURE KALICI SOGUK RENKLER - 100% BEYAZ KAPAMA KORUYUCU KREM BOYA pH Dengeli Mor Sampuan Turunculasma Karsiti Mor Maske TURUNCULASMA KARŞITI MOR TEKNOLOJI
attribute_bottle_silhouette: Rectangular box with straight sides and a flat top.
attribute_packaging_graphics: Photograph of a woman with styled hair, images of included dye kit components, and decorative color swatches.
